## [09:15 - 12:17]

first name, last name, gender, time zone, locale, as in where they're from, which is the country. That is information that is available as soon as somebody subscribes. All the questions you ask and the user replies to, and are stored in a custom, are stored in custom fields. So those are the difference between custom fields and the system fields.
